messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences.

Subject: Search got noticeably slower last week

Searching for a task title used to be instant, now it spins for 5-10 seconds before showing results. Nothing changed in our workspace size. Anyone else seeing this?

response.content: {"category":"performance","priority":"medium","sentiment":"negative","needs_human":false,"draft_reply":"Thanks for reaching out about performance — we're on it and will follow up shortly."}
